variance_certified: evaluation variance (substrate resampling of the fixed 1170-substrate test set); NOT training-seed variance -- a single deployed checkpoint is scored

delta_mean_recall.definition: mean_i (recall_GRAIL_i - recall_SyGMa_i); point < 0 with the 95% CI wholly below 0 certifies GRAIL loses to SyGMa on the common set

mcnemar.definition: exact two-sided McNemar on any-hit@15 discordance; b = GRAIL hit & SyGMa miss, c = SyGMa hit & GRAIL miss

provenance.grail_source: results/recall_factorization.json per_substrate H_i/U_i (deployed generator.pt x filter.pt on all 1170 substrates; Task 2)
provenance.sygma_source: run_benchmark.sygma_topk (phase1+phase2 scenario): first-15 tautomer-distinct, parent-dropped predictions in SyGMa score order
provenance.common_subset_ceiling_def: ratio-of-sums SigmaCfull/SigmaU over the common set (Task 2 Cfull, U)
